name: ownersroom-all
description: Full OwnersRoom surface: cap table, options, portfolio, fund management, contacts, deals, document e-signature, and news. 83 MCP tools + 28 read-only Resources, all skills, all slash commands. Renamed from `ownersroom` in 2.0.0; focused alternatives are `ownersroom-portfolio`, `ownersroom-captable`, `ownersroom-commitments`.
